q<16436394-51818 then c=-442617-(-442617)e=298180-298179 C=V Z=-386673+386674 q={}jI=e D=280948-280948 e=-385341-(-385341)l=jI<e g=q q=2276439-(-157011)e=Z-jI x=r else r=nil B=nil q=4676037-496728 end else q=X[M[30775-30770]]t=q()q=t and 265750-159850 or 506628+2082537 end end end else if q<281815+16340161 then if q<16705485-132911 then if q<-397873+16915215 then if q<16962627-469345 then y=d()s=E(2811386-(-663315),{B,R;O,W})r=d()X[r]=s S=Q(-378648-(-366115))o=nil s={}Z=Q(-60339+47734)X[y]=s N=nil s=j[c]x=X[y]W=k(W)g={[Z]=x,[e]=N}c=s(D,g)s=f(340670+6249788,{y,B,i,R,O,r})W=Q(-434746-(-422457))X[P]=c J=nil z=26110747305928-(-772022)B=k(B)X[U]=s y=k(y)r=k(r)O=k(O)F=nil i=k(i)R=k(R)J=j[W]W=J()I=X[P]R=Q(1008301+-1020710)o=X[U]i=813603+33108518933014 O=-212715+30948484036406 F=o(R,O)J=I[F]F=X[P]R=X[U]O=R(S,i)o=F[O]s=-464686+1963513420480 i=Q(-454287-(-441763))R=X[P]O=X[U]S=O(i,z)F=R[S]r=118122+16619498803409 B=Q(-517393-(-505004))z=Q(-477885+465413)O=X[P]S=X[U]i=S(z,r)R=O[i]i=X[P]z=X[U]r=z(B,s)S=i[r]O={S}I={[o]=F,[R]=O}W[J]=I W=q o=Q(-836884-(-824684))I=j[o]o=Q(597229+-609723)o=I[o]o=o(I)q=o and 838888-(-676436)or 15496099-25447 J=o end end else if q<17197761-437733 then if q<16736328-33057 then q=o t=I q=8608944-317572 else table[Q(-35642+22921)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local isTweening = false

spawn(function ()
    for i,v in pairs(getconnections(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Idled)) do
        v:Disable()
    end
end)

player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(newCharacter)
    character = newCharacter
    hrp = character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    humanoid = character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
    isTweening = false
    local tweenPart = workspace:FindFirstChild("TweenPart")
    if tweenPart then
        tweenPart:Destroy()
    end
end)

RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function ()
    pcall(function ()
        if isTweening and character and workspace:FindFirstChild("TweenPart") then
            hrp.CFrame = workspace.TweenPart.CFrame
        end
    end)
end)

local function creatTweenPart()
    local part = Instance.new("Part")
    part.Size = Vector3.new(1, 1, 1)
    part.Anchored = true
    part.CanCollide = false
    part.CFrame = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame
    part.Transparency = 1
    part.Name = "TweenPart"
    part.Parent = workspace
    return part
end

local function tp(pos)
    isTweening = false
    local currentCharacter = player.Character or character
    local rootPart = currentCharacter and currentCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    if rootPart then
        hrp = rootPart
        rootPart.CFrame = pos
    end
end

local function tween(targetCFrame, _cancel)
    local TweenPart = workspace:FindFirstChild("TweenPart") or creatTweenPart()
    TweenPart.CFrame = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame

    if getgenv().startTween then
        getgenv().startTween:Cancel()
    end

    local distance = (targetCFrame.Position - TweenPart.Position).Magnitude
    
    if distance < 1.5 then
        TweenPart.CFrame = targetCFrame
        isTweening = true
        return
    end

    local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

    local tweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(distance / 300, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear)
    
    isTweening = true

    getgenv().startTween = TweenService:Create(TweenPart, tweenInfo, {CFrame = targetCFrame})
    getgenv().startTween:Play()
    getgenv().startTween.Completed:Wait()

    if _cancel then isTweening = false end

end

local function equipTool(typeTool)
    local success, equipped = pcall(function()
        local backpackFolder = player:FindFirstChild("Backpack")
        if not backpackFolder then return false end

        local backpack = backpackFolder:GetChildren()
        for _, v in pairs(backpack) do
            if v:IsA("Tool") and (v.ToolTip == typeTool or string.find(v.Name, typeTool, 1, true)) then
                humanoid:EquipTool(v)
                return true
            end
        end

        return false
    end)

    return success and equipped
end

local fruitsCost = {
    ["Rocket-Rocket"] = 5000,
    ["Spin-Spin"] = 7500,
    ["Blade-Blade"] = 30000,
    ["Spring-Spring"] = 60000,
    ["Bomb-Bomb"] = 80000,
    ["Smoke-Smoke"] = 100000,
    ["Spike-Spike"] = 180000,
    ["Flame-Flame"] = 250000,
    ["Ice-Ice"] = 350000,
    ["Sand-Sand"] = 420000,
    ["Dark-Dark"] = 500000,
    ["Eagle-Eagle"] = 550000,
    ["Diamond-Diamond"] = 600000,
    ["Light-Light"] = 650000,
    ["Rubber-Rubber"] = 750000,
    ["Ghost-Ghost"] = 940000,
    ["Magma-Magma"] = 960000,
    ["Quake-Quake"] = 1000000,
    ["Buddha-Buddha"] = 1200000,
    ["Love-Love"] = 1300000,
    ["Creation-Creation"] = 1400000,
    ["Spider-Spider"] = 1500000,
    ["Sound-Sound"] = 1700000,
    ["Phoenix-Phoenix"] = 1800000,
    ["Portal-Portal"] = 1900000,
    ["Lightning-Lightning"] = 2100000,
    ["Pain-Pain"] = 2300000,
    ["Blizzard-Blizzard"] = 2400000,
    ["Gravity-Gravity"] = 2500000,
    ["Mammoth-Mammoth"] = 2700000,
    ["T-Rex-T-Rex"] = 2700000,
    ["Dough-Dough"] = 2800000,
    ["Shadow-Shadow"] = 2900000,
    ["Venom-Venom"] = 3000000,
    ["Gas-Gas"] = 3200000,
    ["Spirit-Spirit"] = 3400000,
    ["Tiger-Tiger"] = 5000000,
    ["Yeti-Yeti"] = 5000000,
    ["Kitsune-Kitsune"] = 8000000,
    ["Control-Control"] = 9000000,
    ["Dragon-Dragon"] = 15000000
}

-- ดึงผลที่มีอยู่ใน inventory
local function getAllFruit()
    local itemData = require(game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Economy.ItemId.RawSource)
    local allFruit = {}

    for _, data in pairs(itemData) do
        if data.Id and data.Id.Type == "Fruit" then
            local itemName, itemId = data.Id.StorageKey, data.Id.ItemId
            if not allFruit[itemName] then allFruit[itemName] = {} end
            table.insert(allFruit[itemName], itemId)
        end
    end
    return allFruit
end

local function checkItem(targetList)
    local InventoryController = require(ReplicatedStorage.Controllers.UI.Inventory)
    local ItemReplication = require(ReplicatedStorage.Util.ItemReplication)

    local foundIds = {}

    for _, item in pairs(InventoryController:GetTiles()) do
        for name, target in pairs(targetList) do
            if item.ItemId == target[1] then
                if not foundIds[name] then
                    table.insert(foundIds, name)
                    foundIds[name] = true
                end
            end
        end
    end
    return foundIds
end

local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local folderName = "playerData_pob"

-- ฟังก์ชันสำหรับบันทึกข้อมูลแยกไฟล์
local function savePlayerData(username, items)
    -- สร้างโฟลเดอร์ถ้ายังไม่มี
    if not isfolder(folderName) then
        makefolder(folderName)
    end

    local filePath = folderName .. "/" .. username .. ".json"
    local data = {
        updatedAt = os.date("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
        inventory = items
    }

    local success, jsonString = pcall(function()
        return HttpService:JSONEncode(data)
    end)

    if success then
        writefile(filePath, jsonString)
    else
        warn("Failed to encode data for " .. username)
    end
end


local tradeChairPos = {
    [1] = CFrame.new(-12591.451171875, 335.9563903808594, -7544.7568359375),
    [2] = CFrame.new(-12601.828125, 335.9563903808594, -7544.7568359375)
}

local function getSortedPlayerNames()
    local players = game:GetService("Players"):GetPlayers()
    local names = {}

    for _, player in ipairs(players) do
        table.insert(names, player.DisplayName)
    end

    table.sort(names, function(a, b) 
        return a:lower() < b:lower() 
    end)

    return names
end

local function getTradeChairPos()
    local randomPos = math.random(1, #tradeChairPos)
    return tradeChairPos[randomPos]
end

local function isSit()
    return humanoid.Sit
end

local function isReadyToTrade()
    if not player.PlayerGui.Main.Trade.Visible or not isSit() then return end
    return true
end

local function getUserNameTrade()
    local usernameTextLabel = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.Trade.Container["2"].TextLabel
    if not player.PlayerGui.Main.Trade.Visible or not usernameTextLabel.Text then return false end
    return usernameTextLabel.Text
end

-- add ผลเข้าเทรด
local function addFruit(fruit_id)
    ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Remotes"):WaitForChild("TradeFunction"):InvokeServer("addItem", fruit_id, 1)
end

-- ยืนยันการเทรด
local function acceptTrade()
    ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Remotes"):WaitForChild("TradeFunction"):InvokeServer("accept")
end

-- func นี้จะคืนค่าผลไม้และราคาผลของผู้เล่นที่กำลัง trade ด้วย
local function getUserTradingFruitData(_displaname)
    local filePath = folderName .. "/" .. _displaname .. ".json"
    
    -- 1. ตรวจสอบว่ามีไฟล์ของเป้าหมายอยู่ไหม
    if not isfile(filePath) then 
        return {} 
    end

    -- 2. อ่านไฟล์และ Decode JSON
    local rawData = readfile(filePath)
    local success, userData = pcall(function()
        return HttpService:JSONDecode(rawData)
    end)

    if not success or not userData or not userData.inventory then 
        return {} 
    end

    -- 3. ตรวจสอบราคาจากตาราง fruitsCost (Beli Price)
    local inventory = userData.inventory
    local result = {}
    
    for _, fruit in ipairs(inventory) do
        local cost = fruitsCost[fruit] -- ใช้ตารางราคาที่คุณมี (Rocket=5000, etc.)
        if cost then
            result[fruit] = cost
        end
    end

    return result
end

-- func นี้จะทำการตรวจสอบราคา และคืนค่าผลที่ต้องนำไป addFruit
local function calculateTotalValue(_me, _them)
    local meData   = getUserTradingFruitData(_me)
    local themData = getUserTradingFruitData(_them)

    local meList, themList = {}, {}
    for fruit, cost in pairs(meData)   do table.insert(meList,   { name = fruit, cost = cost }) end
    for fruit, cost in pairs(themData) do table.insert(themList, { name = fruit, cost = cost }) end

    local themNames, meNames = {}, {}
    for _, t in ipairs(themList) do themNames[t.name] = true end
    for _, m in ipairs(meList)   do meNames[m.name]   = true end

    local meFiltered, themFiltered = {}, {}
    for _, m in ipairs(meList)   do if not themNames[m.name] then table.insert(meFiltered,   m) end end
    for _, t in ipairs(themList) do if not meNames[t.name]   then table.insert(themFiltered, t) end end

    table.sort(meFiltered,   function(a, b) return a.cost < b.cost end)
    table.sort(themFiltered, function(a, b) return a.cost < b.cost end)

    local MAX_DIFF_PCT = 0.40

    local function diffPct(a, b)
        if a == 0 or b == 0 then return 1 end
        return math.abs(a - b) / math.max(a, b)
    end

    local nMe   = math.min(#meFiltered,   12)
    local nThem = math.min(#themFiltered, 12)

    local themMap = {}
    for tMask = 1, (2 ^ nThem) - 1 do
        local subset, total, count = {}, 0, 0
        for i = 1, nThem do
            if bit32.band(tMask, 2 ^ (i - 1)) ~= 0 then
                table.insert(subset, themFiltered[i])
                total = total + themFiltered[i].cost
                count = count + 1
            end
        end
        if not themMap[total] or themMap[total].count > count then
            themMap[total] = { fruits = subset, count = count }
        end
    end

    local bestResult = nil
    local bestCount  = math.huge
    local bestDiff   = -1

    for mMask = 1, (2 ^ nMe) - 1 do
        local meSubset, meTotal, meCount = {}, 0, 0
        for i = 1, nMe do
            if bit32.band(mMask, 2 ^ (i - 1)) ~= 0 then
                table.insert(meSubset, meFiltered[i])
                meTotal = meTotal + meFiltered[i].cost
                meCount = meCount + 1
            end
        end

        for themTotal, themEntry in pairs(themMap) do
            local pct   = diffPct(meTotal, themTotal)
            local count = meCount + themEntry.count

            if pct <= MAX_DIFF_PCT then
                local better = false
                if count < bestCount then
                    better = true
                elseif count == bestCount and pct > bestDiff then
                    better = true
                end

                if better then
                    bestCount  = count
                    bestDiff   = pct
                    bestResult = {
                        me        = meSubset,
                        them      = themEntry.fruits,
                        meTotal   = meTotal,
                        themTotal = themTotal,
                        diffAbs   = math.abs(meTotal - themTotal),
                        diffPct   = pct * 100,
                    }
                end
            end
        end
    end

    if not bestResult then return nil end

    -- return เฉพาะ array item id ของผลฝั่ง me
    local fruitIdsByName = getAllFruit()
    local result = {}
    for _, fruit in ipairs(bestResult.me) do
        local fruitIds = fruitIdsByName[fruit.name]
        if fruitIds and fruitIds[1] then
            table.insert(result, fruitIds[1])
        else
            warn("Missing fruit item id for " .. tostring(fruit.name))
        end
    end
    return result
end

local args = {
    {
        NPC = "Dojo Trainer",
        Command = "RequestQuest"
    }
}
local dacro_module = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Modules"):WaitForChild("Net"):WaitForChild("RF/InteractDragonQuest")

-- ตัวแปรนี้เก็บ progress ของเควส
local Progress = {
    ["Timeout"] = nil,
    ["Progress"] = nil
}

local function getQuestProgress()

    tween(CFrame.new(5868.453125, 1207.7784423828125, 870.8200073242188))
    task.wait(1)
    
    if not dacro_module:InvokeServer(unpack(args))["Timeout"] then
        task.wait(2)
        Progress["Timeout"] = false
        Progress["Progress"] = dacro_module:InvokeServer(unpack(args))["Quest"]["Progress"]
    else
        Progress["Timeout"] = true
        Progress["Progress"] = -1
    end
    
end

-- เช็คว่ามีเข็มขัดหรือยัง ถ้ามีแล้วคือเสร้จเควสเทรด
local function sucsessTradeQuest()
    local item = {["OrangeBelt"] = {213}}
    if checkItem(item)["OrangeBelt"] then
        return true
    end
    return false
end

local function sentQuest()
    local args = {
        {
            NPC = "Dojo Trainer",
            Command = "ClaimQuest"
        }
    }
    game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):WaitForChild("Modules"):WaitForChild("Net"):WaitForChild("RF/InteractDragonQuest"):InvokeServer(unpack(args))
end

-- function นี้ไว้สำหรับไปช่วยเทรดผล
local function helperTrade()

    if player:GetAttribute("ExactLocation") ~= "Mansion" then
        tween(workspace._WorldOrigin.Locations.Mansion.CFrame * CFrame.new(0,100,0), true)
    elseif isReadyToTrade() then
        local aloowedFruits = calculateTotalValue(player.DisplayName, getUserNameTrade())

        if aloowedFruits then
            for i, v in pairs(aloowedFruits) do
                warn(i, v)
                task.wait(0.5)
                addFruit(v)
            end

            repeat task.wait(0.3)
                acceptTrade()
            until not isSit()
        else
            if isSit() then humanoid.Sit = false end
            tween(workspace._WorldOrigin.Locations.Mansion.CFrame * CFrame.new(0,100,0), true)
            warn("none fruit to add")
            task.wait(10)
        end

        savePlayerData(player.DisplayName, checkItem(getAllFruit()))
    elseif not isSit() then
        tp(tradeChairPos[1])
        task.wait(1)
    end

end

-- function นี้เทรดแบบ นอ มอลล คือเควสยังไม่เสร็จจ้า
local function normalTrade()
    if Progress["Progress"] == 1 then
        tween(CFrame.new(5868.453125, 1207.7784423828125, 870.8200073242188))
        task.wait(1)
        sentQuest()
    elseif player:GetAttribute("ExactLocation") ~= "Mansion" then
        tween(workspace._WorldOrigin.Locations.Mansion.CFrame * CFrame.new(0,100,0), true)
    elseif isReadyToTrade() then
        local aloowedFruits = calculateTotalValue(player.DisplayName, getUserNameTrade())

        if aloowedFruits then
            for i, v in pairs(aloowedFruits) do
                warn(i, v)
                task.wait(0.5)
                addFruit(v)
            end

            repeat task.wait(0.3)
                acceptTrade()
            until not isSit()

            getQuestProgress()
            task.wait(1)
        else
            if isSit() then humanoid.Sit = false end
            tween(workspace._WorldOrigin.Locations.Mansion.CFrame * CFrame.new(0,100,0), true)
            warn("none fruit to add")
            task.wait(10)
        end

        savePlayerData(player.DisplayName, checkItem(getAllFruit()))
    elseif not isSit() then
        tp(getTradeChairPos())
        task.wait(1)
    end

end

local function mainTradeFruit()
    if Progress["Progress"] == nil or Progress["Timeout"] == nil  then
        getQuestProgress()
    elseif sucsessTradeQuest() or Progress["Timeout"] then -- อันนี้คือเช็คว่าเควสเสร็จแล้ว จะให้ไปช่วยเทรดผล
        warn("Helper Trade")
        helperTrade()
    elseif not sucsessTradeQuest() then
        normalTrade()
    end

end

if getgenv().Configs["Mode"] == "trade" then
    warn("in loop ...")
    local myFruits = getAllFruit()
    local foundItems = checkItem(myFruits)

    savePlayerData(player.DisplayName, foundItems)
    task.wait(3)
    while true do task.wait()
        warn("in loop1 ...")
        mainTradeFruit()
    end
end

local function drop(_fruit)
    if not _fruit then return false end

    local currentCharacter = player.Character or character
    if not currentCharacter then return false end

    local fruitTool = currentCharacter:FindFirstChild(_fruit)
    if not fruitTool or not fruitTool:IsA("Tool") then return false end

    local eatRemote = fruitTool:FindFirstChild("EatRemote")
    if not eatRemote then return false end

    local success, err = pcall(function()
        eatRemote:InvokeServer("Drop")
    end)

    if not success then
        warn("Drop fruit failed: " .. tostring(err))
        return false
    end

    return true
end

local function random()
    local success, err = pcall(function()
        ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Remotes"):WaitForChild("CommF_"):InvokeServer("Cousin", "Buy", "DLCBoxData")
    end)

    if not success then
        warn("Random fruit failed: " .. tostring(err))
    end

    return success
end

-- local function questProgress()
--     if not dacro_module:InvokeServer(unpack(args)) then return nil end
--     return true
-- end

local Progress;

local function requestQuestProgress()
    local success, response = pcall(function()
        return dacro_module:InvokeServer(unpack(args))
    end)

    if not success or not response then return nil end

    if response["Timeout"] then
        Progress = -1
        return Progress
    end

    local quest = response["Quest"]
    if quest and quest["Progress"] ~= nil then
        Progress = quest["Progress"]
        return Progress
    end

    return nil
end

local function getQuestProgress()

    if not requestQuestProgress() and not Progress then
        tween(CFrame.new(5868.453125, 1207.7784423828125, 870.8200073242188), true)
        task.wait(2)
        requestQuestProgress()
    else
        task.wait(2)
        requestQuestProgress()
    end
    task.wait(1)

    if Progress == nil then
        Progress = 0
    end

    return Progress
end

local dropFruitPos = {
    ["Helper"] = CFrame.new(5847.72266, 1208.31042, 879.862549, -0.622320533, 7.22706872e-08, 0.782762527, -3.3727261e-08, 1, -1.19141951e-07, -0.782762527, -1.00544916e-07, -0.622320533),
    ["Skibidi67"] = CFrame.new(5844.11279, 1208.31042, 882.85321, 0.650864184, 3.9195438e-08, -0.759194136, -9.16891736e-08, 1, -2.69782916e-08, 0.759194136, 8.71690915e-08, 0.650864184)
}

local function getDropFruitPos()
    if table.find(getgenv().Configs["Helper"], player.Name) then return dropFruitPos["Helper"] end
    return dropFruitPos["Skibidi67"]
end

local function getCurrentHrp()
    local currentCharacter = player.Character or character
    if not currentCharacter then return nil end

    local rootPart = currentCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    if rootPart then
        hrp = rootPart
        return rootPart
    end

    return nil
end

local DROP_DISTANCE = 2
local DROP_OFFSET_DONE = CFrame.new(-20, 0, 0)

local function isHelperPlayer()
    return table.find(getgenv().Configs["Helper"], player.Name) ~= nil
end

local function moveToDropPos(offset)
    local currentHrp = getCurrentHrp()
    if not currentHrp then return false end

    local target = getDropFruitPos()
    if offset then
        target = target * offset
    end

    if (currentHrp.Position - target.Position).Magnitude > DROP_DISTANCE then
        tp(target)
        task.wait(0.2)
    end

    return true
end

-- เช็คว่าผู้เล่นถือผลไม้อยู่หรือไม่
local function isPlayerHoldFruit()
    local currentCharacter = player.Character or character
    if not currentCharacter then return nil end

    for i, v in pairs(currentCharacter:GetChildren()) do
        if v:IsA("Tool") and string.find(v.Name, "Fruit", 1, true) then
            return v.Name
        end
    end
    return nil
end

local function isHasFruitInBP()
    local backpack = player:FindFirstChild("Backpack")
    if not backpack then return nil end

    for i, v in pairs(backpack:GetChildren()) do
        if v:IsA("Tool") and string.find(v.Name, "Fruit", 1, true) then
            return v.Name
        end
    end
    return nil
end

local function shouldDropFruit()
    local fruitName = isPlayerHoldFruit()
    if fruitName then
        return fruitName
    end
end

local function shouldRandomFruit()
    local shouldRandom = not isHasFruitInBP() and not isPlayerHoldFruit()
    return shouldRandom
end

local function hasFruit()
    return isPlayerHoldFruit() ~= nil or isHasFruitInBP() ~= nil
end

local function equipFruitIfNeeded()
    local heldFruit = isPlayerHoldFruit()
    if heldFruit then return heldFruit end

    local backpackFruit = isHasFruitInBP()
    if not backpackFruit then return nil end

    if equipTool(backpackFruit) then
        task.wait(0.4)
        return isPlayerHoldFruit()
    end

    return nil
end

local function dropFruitAtDropPos()
    if not moveToDropPos() then return false end

    local fruitName = equipFruitIfNeeded()
    if not fruitName then return false end

    task.wait(0.2)
    fruitName = isPlayerHoldFruit()
    if not fruitName then return false end

    local dropped = drop(fruitName)
    if dropped then
        task.wait(0.5)
    end

    return dropped
end

local function sucsessDropQuest()
    local item = {["BlueBelt"] = {211}}
    if checkItem(item)["BlueBelt"] then
        return true
    end
    return false
end

local function dropFruit()
    if not getCurrentHrp() then return end

    if isHelperPlayer() then
        if dropFruitAtDropPos() then return end

        if not Progress then
            getQuestProgress()
            return
        end

        moveToDropPos()

        if shouldRandomFruit() then
            if random() then
                task.wait(1)
                dropFruitAtDropPos()
            end
            return
        end

        if not sucsessDropQuest() and getQuestProgress() >= 1 then
            sentQuest()
            task.wait(0.5)
        end
    else
        if sucsessDropQuest() then
            if hasFruit() then
                dropFruitAtDropPos()
            else
                moveToDropPos(DROP_OFFSET_DONE)
            end
            return
        end

        if dropFruitAtDropPos() then return end

        if not Progress then
            getQuestProgress()
            return
        end

        if not sucsessDropQuest() and getQuestProgress() >= 1 then
            sentQuest()
            task.wait(0.5)
            return
        end

        moveToDropPos()
    end
end

if getgenv().Configs["Mode"] == "drop" then

    while true do task.wait()
        dropFruit()
    end

end
